pages.title: What To Do
pages.text: Goal: fill Netherite momentum, then write $(l)入$() to enter the Ink Realm.$(br2)The Ink Realm is an independent dimension. Current version: Forecourt (3x3 chunk main island) with Boundary Stele, Parchment Lanterns, and bamboo-plank structures. Island surrounded by Ink Sea.

pages.title: Ink Sea Danger
pages.text: Ink Sea slows, deals continuous damage, and teleports you back to the island if you sink too deep.$(br2)Write $(l)出$() to return. Death does not respawn in the Ink Realm.$(br2)The Boundary Stele shows current version info.

pages.title: 界 (Unstable)
pages.text: Writing $(l)界$() currently shows "This boundary is not yet stable".$(br2)Future versions will unlock instances and new districts within the Ink Realm.
